issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. First effect: passive protection when trash ≥7. Second effect: [Your Turn] power boost to Five Elders when trash ≥10. Both must be implemented.

Missing first effect: 'If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects' - should be a Permanent trigger with TrashCount condition and protection/prevention action

Missing second effect: '[Your Turn] If you have 10 or more cards in your trash, set the base power of all of your {Five Elders} type Characters to 7000' - should have duration:DuringYourTurn, TrashCount ≥10 condition, and PowerBoost action targeting Five Elders type
